repositories.name: widgets
repositories.description: A small Python widget pricing service

files.content:
# widgets

A small widget pricing service.

# widgets

A small widget pricing service.

## Development

Run `python -m pytest` before opening a pull request.

pull_requests.title: Add optional cart discount to total()
pull_requests.body: Adds a `discount` parameter (default 0.0) to `total()` so callers can apply a percentage discount. Backwards compatible — existing callers keep the old behavior.
pull_requests.head: add-discount
pull_requests.author: GaganSD

pull_requests.title: Document the test command in the README
pull_requests.body: Docs-only change: adds a Development section telling contributors to run pytest before opening a PR.
pull_requests.head: docs-testing-note
pull_requests.author: GaganSD
